name: Brown Soda Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the all-purpose flour, salt, and baking soda into a bowl.
2. Stir in the whole wheat flour until well combined.
3. Rub the margarine into the dry ingredients using your fingertips, lifting them high to incorporate air.
4. Add the buttermilk gradually, mixing with a fork. If necessary, add more buttermilk to form a soft dough.
5. Knead the dough gently until it becomes smooth.
6. Place the dough on a greased baking sheet and divide it into four sections.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 40 minutes.
8. Allow the bread to cool completely on a wire rack before cutting and serving with butter.
Preparation time: 20 minutes
Baking time: 40 minutes
